# Jack McPickle — Full Site Content

> Jack McPickle is a consultant, instructor, and developer based in Australia. He helps teams design, build, and ship digital products — from e-commerce platforms to developer tools — and mentors engineers on architecture, delivery, and modern web stacks.

Last updated: 2026-06-10
Site: https://jack.mcpickle.com.au
Email: jack@mcpickle.com.au
GitHub: https://github.com/jackmcpickle
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jackmcpickle/

---

## Summary

Jack McPickle blends product strategy with hands-on engineering. He works on large-scale e-commerce, platform architecture, and greenfield product builds. Clients and teams rely on him for clear technical direction, pragmatic delivery, and mentoring across Next.js, React, Magento, Shopify, WordPress, and headless commerce stacks.

---

## About Jack McPickle

Jack builds digital products, mentors development teams, and keeps large platforms moving. He works with startups and established brands on architecture, migrations, and new feature delivery. Based in Australia, he collaborates with teams worldwide.

Role: Consultant / Instructor / Developer
Location: Australia (remote worldwide)

---

## Services

- **Consulting** — Product strategy, technical audits, and architecture reviews
- **Development** — Hands-on builds for web apps, e-commerce, and internal tools
- **Instruction** — Workshops and mentoring on modern frontend and platform design
- **Migrations** — Moving legacy stores and CMS sites to modern stacks (Next.js, headless)

---

## Talks and workshops

- Design Systems Workshop — various events
- Headless Commerce — industry sessions
- Migrating to Next.js — meetups and workshops
- Performance Budgets — frontend conferences

---

## Frequently asked questions

**Who is Jack McPickle?**
Jack McPickle is an Australian consultant, instructor, and developer who helps teams build and ship digital products.

**What does Jack specialise in?**
E-commerce platforms, product strategy, platform architecture, Next.js and React apps, Magento and Shopify builds, and team mentoring.

**How do I hire Jack?**
Email jack@mcpickle.com.au with your project scope, timeline, and team size. Jack works with clients worldwide from Australia.

**What technologies does Jack use?**
Next.js, React, TypeScript, Astro, Magento, Shopify, WordPress, Craft CMS, Node.js, and headless commerce patterns.

**Does Jack do workshops or training?**
Yes. Jack delivers conference talks, meetup sessions, and hands-on workshops on architecture, design systems, and modern frontend development.

---

## Site structure

- `/` — Portfolio home with work, apps, talks, podcasts, and FAQ
- `/about` — Extended bio, services, and contact information
- `/llms.txt` — Concise LLM-oriented site summary
- `/llms-full.txt` — This file; comprehensive site content for AI systems
